title: SpongeForge 1.12.2 [LTS]
description: Long Term Support for SpongeForge on 1.12.2, compatible with Cleanroom!
body:
A Forge implementation of the Sponge API. Continuation of the now obsolete SpongeForge project.

This continuation solves compatibility issues with **Cleanroom** and newer **Mixin** versions.

You **HAVE** to use SpongeAPI 7.x compatible plugins with SpongeForge. Other versions will currently NOT work.
